name: Idea Validator
persona: A Head of Product or founder at a 20–150 person B2B SaaS company deciding whether an idea deserves a discovery sprint under limited research bandwidth
problem_statement: Teams commit roadmap time to exciting ideas before pressure-testing assumptions, leading to late discovery of vague value props, crowded alternatives, or hidden complexity
artifact_type: single-page web app with real-time scoring, weakness flags, assumption breakdown, and a persistent verdict side panel
